summary.lv: AGCSOFT meklē produktu vadītāju (CPO), kas pārņems visu produkta dzīves ciklu no idejas līdz ieviešanai tirgū, definēs produkta vīziju un ceļa kartes un vadīs produktu un dizaina komandas; nepieciešama 5+ gadu pieredze produktu vadībā.
summary.en: AGCSOFT is hiring a Chief Product Officer to own the full product lifecycle from concept to launch, set product vision and roadmaps, and lead product and design teams; 5+ years of product leadership experience required.
